samplingFrame: Core 28-document set drawn from Abraham Lincoln's speeches, letters, and public addresses (1838-1865), selected for full annotation in lincoln-metaphor-analysis. Validation and reference tiers are tracked as separate future corpus records once imported.
notes: Corpus document metadata and raw text import planned for Milestones 15-16 (see docs/architecture/imported-projects.md). No documents imported yet as of Milestone 14; this record establishes the registry entry ahead of import.

samplingFrame: 41-document stratified corpus spanning American Revolution, Napoleonic, Lincoln, and Nazi-era cases under Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice, selected via the sacrifice-law-workbench manifest-driven pipeline.
notes: American Revolution and Napoleon cases do not yet have corresponding PPW case files; case mapping must be confirmed (PPW #149-#151) before their corpus subsets are imported. Corpus import planned for Milestone 17. No documents imported yet as of Milestone 14.
